user_query: My friend lives in Mississauga, about an hour from downtown. What days are without any work commitments or flights?

selected_nodes.reasoning: Day 9 only lists restaurants and shopping/POI visits (brunch, Eaton Centre, boutiques, dinner); no flights or work commitments are present.
Day 8 is a full-day Niagara Falls excursion and evening dining — a tour and leisure activities, with no flights or work commitments mentioned.
Day 7 lists museum visits, dining, and walking tours (ROM, Distillery District, etc.) and evening dinner — no flights or work obligations are included.
